skill.name: imaginify-guide
skill.description: Provides guidance, tutorials, and best practices for using Imaginify, an AI-powered SaaS platform and Next.js boilerplate for image generation and editing tools.
skill.summary: Official guide for Imaginify AI platform featuring text-to-image generation, background removal, and photo restoration tools.
skill.author: ImaginifyAI

security_audit.summary: All 36 static analysis findings are false positives. The skill contains only documentation files (markdown) and a test configuration file with no executable code. Hardcoded URLs are informational references to the official Imaginify website. Backtick patterns are markdown inline code formatting, not shell execution. No cryptographic code exists. This is a safe informational guide skill.

content.user_title: Learn and master the Imaginify AI platform
content.value_statement: Users need clear guidance on using AI image tools and understanding the Imaginify platform. This skill provides comprehensive tutorials, feature explanations, and best practices for creators and developers.
actual_capabilities: Explains Imaginify platform features including text-to-image, image-to-image, and background removal tools
Provides step-by-step tutorials for using specific Imaginify tools
Shares best practices for AI image generation and prompt engineering
Describes Imaginify as a Next.js 15 SaaS boilerplate for developers
Answers questions about pricing, features, and platform capabilities
Guides users through account setup and tool selection workflows
limitations: Cannot execute Imaginify tools directly - only provides guidance and instructions
Does not have real-time access to Imaginify platform status or user accounts
Cannot process images or generate AI content within Claude Code
Information is limited to publicly available documentation about Imaginify

use_cases.title: New user onboarding
use_cases.description: First-time users learn about Imaginify features and get started with the platform through guided tutorials.
use_cases.target_user: Creative professionals exploring AI image tools

use_cases.title: Developer boilerplate evaluation
use_cases.description: Developers researching SaaS boilerplates learn about Imaginify's Next.js 15 stack and deployment options.

use_cases.title: Feature-specific guidance
use_cases.description: Users get detailed instructions for specific tools like background removal or photo restoration.
use_cases.target_user: Existing Imaginify users seeking workflow tips

prompt_templates.title: Basic introduction
prompt_templates.prompt: What is Imaginify and what can it do?
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a quick overview of the Imaginify platform and its core features.

prompt_templates.title: Tool tutorial request
prompt_templates.prompt: How do I use the background remover tool step by step?
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs detailed instructions for using a specific Imaginify tool.

prompt_templates.title: Best practices inquiry
prompt_templates.prompt: What are some tips for getting better results with text-to-image generation?
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to improve their AI image generation skills with expert guidance.

prompt_templates.title: Developer evaluation
prompt_templates.prompt: I'm building an AI SaaS. Should I use Imaginify as a boilerplate? What's the tech stack?
prompt_templates.scenario: Developer is evaluating Imaginify for building their own AI-powered SaaS product.

output_examples.output: Imaginify is an AI-powered SaaS platform and boilerplate that lets you generate, edit, and enhance images effortlessly. Whether you want to turn text into art, remove backgrounds, or restore old photos, it has you covered. The platform is built on Next.js 15 and React 19, making it both a creative toolkit and a developer boilerplate.

output_examples.input: How do I remove backgrounds from images?
output: Visit imaginify.app and sign in to your account
Select the Background Remover tool from the dashboard
Upload your image by dragging and dropping or clicking upload
Wait a few seconds for the AI to process and remove the background
Preview the result and download the transparent PNG file
For best results, use images where the subject has clear edges against the background

best_practices: Use detailed, descriptive prompts with style references for better text-to-image results
Always preview generated images before downloading to conserve credits
For background removal, choose images with clear subject-background separation
anti_patterns: Do not expect the skill to execute Imaginify tools directly - it only provides guidance
Avoid using vague prompts when asking about specific features - name the tool you want to learn about
Do not share account credentials or sensitive information when discussing platform usage

faq.question: Is Imaginify free to use?
faq.answer: Imaginify offers both free and paid plans. The free tier includes limited credits for testing core features. Paid plans provide higher usage limits, priority processing, and API access for developers.

faq.question: Can I use Imaginify as a boilerplate for my own SaaS?
faq.answer: Yes, Imaginify is designed as both a ready-to-use AI platform and a Next.js 15 boilerplate. Developers can use the codebase as a foundation to build custom AI SaaS products with features like authentication, payments, and API integrations already implemented.

faq.question: What AI models does Imaginify use for image generation?
faq.answer: Imaginify integrates with leading AI image generation models. The platform abstracts model complexity so users can focus on creative prompts rather than technical configurations.

faq.question: How do I get started with Imaginify?
faq.answer: Visit imaginify.app, create an account with your email, and you will receive free credits to try the platform. Start with simple tools like Background Remover or Text-to-Image to familiarize yourself with the interface.

faq.question: Does Imaginify offer API access for developers?
faq.answer: Yes, paid plans include API access that allows developers to integrate Imaginify's AI tools into their own applications. The API supports text-to-image, background removal, and other core features.

faq.question: What file formats does Imaginify support for uploads and downloads?
faq.answer: Imaginify supports common image formats including PNG, JPEG, and WebP for uploads. Downloads are typically provided as high-quality PNG files with transparency support for tools like Background Remover.
